title: lespedeza juncea var. juncea
intro: Lespedeza juncea var. juncea, also known as Chinese Bush Clover, is a perennial legume plant native to East Asia, characterized by its small white or pink flowers and hairy stems. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Lespedeza juncea var. juncea include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
